title: Operations Exec , NO EXP , 3 - 5K , Completion bonus
description:
PLS read in full for required details before application*

Production Specialist , (NO EXP needed) 3k – 5k, + completion bonus

Overview

An award leading green solar power company in Singapore, ISO Certified with diverse clients in the commercial and industrial sectors. The company holds multiple world solar efficiency records across multiple device structures and sizes while demonstrating robust industrial capabilities through ASEAN’s largest perovskite production line in Singapore.

In this position you will play an integral part of the team with highly skilled specialists that ‘bring ideas to life’ for our clients across all types of industrial projects, This role offers the opportunity to specialize in Open Lab operations with trainings provided for those without experiences

Job Description (Shift require, NO overnight duties)

  • Machine operation on a pilot line of perovskite photovoltaic modules
  • Conduct routine testing of perovskite solar cells.
  • Packing of finished goods.
  • Cleaning of workstation
  • Coordinate and manage daily operational activities related to container and freight transportation
  • Liaise with customers, drivers, port operators, and internal teams to ensure timely delivery
  • Prepare and process operational documents, including job orders, delivery schedules, and transport records
  • Monitor shipment status and handle operational issues or delays promptly
  • Perform servicing (maintenance),repairing (troubleshooting) and replacement (Installation) of the equipment’s where appropriate.       
  • Able to identify safety hazards and propose corrective action.
  • Support device fabrication processes under engineers' guidance.

·        Ad – Hoc Assign

Requirements

  • ITS  /  Energy and Chemicals (Diploma in Engineering / material science)
  • On Site work with west area transport pick up
  • Able to communicate in mandarin due to business needs
  • Shift hours , able to carry up to 10kg

The following is mandatory for submission, including your cover letter, which illustrates your skills and experiences for each segment as of requirements. [ mailto:meyers@oaktree.com.sg]

·        Cover letter + Detail resume (with clear dates of each tenure)

·        Date of birth

·        Citizenship/ Work pass status

·        Current salary

·        Notice period

·        Reasons for leaving past 3 roles

What You Can Expect from Us  

We succeed together and believe the best inspires the best, so we invest in supporting each other, learning together and celebrating our success.

﻿Our Total Rewards program reflects our commitment to helping you achieve your career ambitions, recognizing your contributions, investing in your well-being and providing competitive benefits and pay.

We can’t wait to see where your ambitions take you.

Apply today!

OAKTREE CONSULTING

Oaktree is committed to providing quality and prompt services in the following areas

  1. Permanent, contract and temporary recruitment for both local and foreign talents.
  2. Event/Project Recruitment
  3. Recruitment Process Outsourcing
  4. Payroll Outsourcing

Oaktree’s services cover every industry in the job market and we have a team of dedicated and industry-focused consultants in each of our three divisions.

  1. Oaktree Technology
  2. Oaktree Engineering
  3. Oaktree Business Support 

We believe in ensuring every stage of our service process is professionally conducted and reviewing every resume submitted to ensure the candidate meet the right skills, qualifications and personality to perform to our client’s expectations.
